form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when eighth (18.66) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time when eighth (18.66) at this track in a Grade 5. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. Looks one of the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on entering the first turn, became unbalanced and raced wide.
Checked off the heels turning out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 300m at this track beaten 11 lengths (18.30) behind Voila in a Grade 5 on March 28. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 300m at this track beaten 11 lengths (18.30) behind Voila in a Grade 5 on March 28. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.32) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (18.32) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped heavily and became unbalanced in the back straight.
Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (17.97) over 300m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (17.97) over 300m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Top-three aspirations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on then shifted wider rounding the first turn.
Entering the first turn forced wide and collided, losing valuable ground.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 4 over 340m at Gunnedah in a Grade 5. Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 4 over 340m at Gunnedah in a Grade 5. Can't make much of a case this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and bumped heavily in the back straight.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Geelong to win by one length in 22.96, beating Harmonica. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on March 28 over 300m at this track behind Patient Vicky beaten 15 lengths (18.44). Needs to find a bit more to test these.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride; Checked off heels and lost momentum rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when sixth over 300m at this track. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth over 300m at this track, beaten 11 lengths (18.03) behind Linkin Park in a Grade 4/5 on April 1. Prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a fourth (17.95) over 300m at this track. Looks a winning chance while fresh.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on March 28 over 272m at The Gardens behind Magic Silver beaten 7 lengths (16.63) in a Grade 5. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.
